activities.title: Send Prewarm Request
activities.description: stream_responses_websocket(warmup=true): build ResponseCreateWsRequest with generate:false. Sends via WS connection. Prewarm treated as first WS attempt for retry budget

activities.title: Drain Prewarm Stream
activities.description: Consume response events until Completed. Discard all output items. Only purpose is to establish server-side context and get response_id

activities.title: Capture Prewarm Response ID
activities.description: Extract response_id from Completed event. Store in WebsocketSession.last_response for subsequent incremental request. Also captures items_added for prefix matching

activities.title: Handle Prewarm Failure
activities.description: Non-blocking: on error or FallbackToHttp, call try_switch_fallback_transport(). Prewarm failure does not block the actual request — falls through to normal WS or HTTP
